languages.text: This character has already been moved back in time during this round. Until next turn, they can approach the Chronomancer again without being sent back in time again.

languages.text: Этот персонаж уже был возвращен во времени в этом {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунде{/g}. До своего следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} он может приблизиться к хрономанту, не будучи возвращенным снова.

languages.text: Dieser Charakter ist in dieser {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} bereits in die Vergangenheit gereist. Bis zum nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} kann er sich dem Chronomanten nähern, ohne erneut zurückgeschickt zu werden.
languages.original_text: This character has already been back in time this {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Until the next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they can approach the Chronomancer without being sent back again.

traits.locale_text: Dieser Charakter ist in dieser {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} bereits in die Vergangenheit gereist. Bis zum nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} kann er sich dem Chronomanten nähern, ohne erneut zurückgeschickt zu werden.

languages.text: Este personaje ya ha vuelto atrás en el tiempo este {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}. Hasta el próximo {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, puede acercarse al Cronomante sin retroceder de nuevo.
languages.original_text: This character has already been back in time this {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Until the next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they can approach the Chronomancer without being sent back again.

languages.text: Bu karakter, bu {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntta{/g} daha önce zamanda geri gönderildi. Bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tura{/g} kadar yeniden geri gönderilmeden Kronobaz'a yaklaşabilir.
languages.original_text: This character has already been back in time this {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Until the next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they can approach the Chronomancer without being sent back again.

languages.text: 该角色在这一{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}中已经历过时间回溯。在下个{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始前，该角色接近编时匠时不会被送回。
languages.original_text: This character has already been back in time this {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Until the next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they can approach the Chronomancer without being sent back again.

traits.locale_text: 该角色在这一{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}中已经历过时间回溯。在下个{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始前，该角色接近编时匠时不会被送回。

languages.text: Ce personnage a déjà été renvoyé dans le passé pendant ce {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Jusqu'au {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} suivant, il peut s'approcher du chronomancien sans être à nouveau renvoyé dans le passé.
languages.original_text: This character has already been back in time this {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Until the next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they can approach the Chronomancer without being sent back again.

traits.locale_text: Ce personnage a déjà été renvoyé dans le passé pendant ce {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Jusqu'au {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} suivant, il peut s'approcher du chronomancien sans être à nouveau renvoyé dans le passé.

languages.text: このキャラクターはすでにこの{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}で過去に戻っています。次の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}まで、彼らは再び過去に戻されることなく、クロノマンサーに近づけます。
languages.original_text: This character has already been back in time this {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Until the next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they can approach the Chronomancer without being sent back again.

traits.locale_text: このキャラクターはすでにこの{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}で過去に戻っています。次の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}まで、彼らは再び過去に戻されることなく、クロノマンサーに近づけます。
